posts.author: sescott (Steve Escott)
posts.cookedHtml:
I would like to be able to add Dashboard-style chart widgets to Item View tabs. These charts would be able to use connected mirror column data to show information that exists on other boards.

In my use case, I would like to be able to open a contact’s Item View card and visualize some of their account totals over time using a chart.

Currently, the CRM product allows for 1 “chart”, the Deal Stage widget. I would like to be able to show other types of charts in the Work Management product.

I hope that others find this suggestion useful as well.

Steve Escott
AllDayIT Ltd.
monday.com Certified Partner
